sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἑκατοντάρχηςἑκατοντάρχος

- Transliteration: hekatontarches

- Phonetic: hek-at-on-tar'-khace

- Definition:

1. an officer in the Roman army

- Origin: from G1540 and G757

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G1540 and G757; the captain of one hundred men: - centurion.
